option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white" android:fillViewport="true" tools:context=".ngo.NGORegistrationActivity">
<RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- Back Button --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivBack" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_alignParentTop="true" android:layout_alignParentStart="true" android:src="@drawable/ic_back_arrow" android:contentDescription="@string/back_button" android:padding="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" />
<!-- Top Illustration -->
<!-- Title Section -->
<!-- Profile Section --> <ImageView android:layout_width="129dp" android:layout_height="124dp" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp" android:scaleType="fitCenter" android:src="@drawable/ic_signup_pets" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/titleSection" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_below="@id/ivBack" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNgoTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="NGO Registration" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Complete your profile to join Pawsitive!" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Form Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/profileSection" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_below="@id/titleSection" android:layout_marginTop="19dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/ivNgoProfilePhoto" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:padding="2dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/ic_profile_placeholder" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/CircleAppearance" app:strokeColor="@color/yellow_primary" app:strokeWidth="2dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnChangeNgoPhoto" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="CHANGE PHOTO" android:textColor="@color/yellow_primary" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/formSection" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_below="@id/profileSection" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- NGO Name --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="NGO Name" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_user" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Phone Number --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoPhone" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="Phone Number" android:inputType="phone" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_username" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Address --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoAddress" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="Address" android:inputType="textPostalAddress" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_location" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- License Number --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoLicense" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="License Number" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_warning" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Certificate Upload Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnUploadCertificate" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="UPLOAD CERTIFICATE (IMAGE/PDF)" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:backgroundTint="@color/gray_light" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.UnelevatedButton" />
<!-- Certificate Status --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvCertificateStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="No certificate selected" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Description --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoDescription" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="NGO Description" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:minLines="3" android:padding="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_message" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:gravity="top" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Sign Up Button -->
<!-- Success/Status Message -->
<Button android:id="@+id/btnSendForVerification" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/btn_rounded_yellow" android:elevation="4dp" android:text="SIGN UP" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNgoStatusMessage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:text="" android:textColor="@color/green_success" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressNgo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:visibility="gone" android:indeterminateTint="@color/yellow_primary" />
</RelativeLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white" android:fillViewport="true" tools:context=".ngo.NGORegistrationActivity">
<RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- Back Button --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivBack" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_alignParentTop="true" android:layout_alignParentStart="true" android:src="@drawable/ic_back_arrow" android:contentDescription="@string/back_button" android:padding="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" />
<!-- Top Illustration -->
<!-- Title Section -->
<!-- Profile Section --> <ImageView android:layout_width="129dp" android:layout_height="124dp" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_marginEnd="2dp" android:scaleType="fitCenter" android:src="@drawable/ic_signup_pets" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/titleSection" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_below="@id/ivBack" android:layout_marginTop="18dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNgoTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="NGO " android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Registration" android:textColor="@color/yellow_primary" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Complete your profile to join Pawsitive!" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Form Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/profileSection" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_below="@id/titleSection" android:layout_marginTop="19dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/ivNgoProfilePhoto" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:padding="2dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/ic_profile_placeholder" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/CircleAppearance" app:strokeColor="@color/yellow_primary" app:strokeWidth="2dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnChangeNgoPhoto" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="CHANGE PHOTO" android:textColor="@color/yellow_primary" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/formSection" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_below="@id/profileSection" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- NGO Name --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="NGO Name" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_user" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Phone Number --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoPhone" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="Phone Number" android:inputType="phone" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_username" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Address --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoAddress" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="Address" android:inputType="textPostalAddress" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_location" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- License Number --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoLicense" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="License Number" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_warning" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Certificate Upload Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnUploadCertificate" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="UPLOAD CERTIFICATE (IMAGE/PDF)" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:backgroundTint="@color/gray_light" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.UnelevatedButton" />
<!-- Certificate Status --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvCertificateStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="No certificate selected" android:textColor="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Description --> <EditText android:id="@+id/etNgoDescription" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="NGO Description" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:minLines="3" android:padding="16dp" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_message" android:drawablePadding="12dp" android:gravity="top" android:textColor="@color/gray_dark" android:textColorHint="@color/gray_text" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Sign Up Button -->
<!-- Success/Status Message -->
<Button android:id="@+id/btnSendForVerification" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="@drawable/btn_rounded_yellow" android:elevation="4dp" android:text="SIGN UP" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNgoStatusMessage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:text="" android:textColor="@color/green_success" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressNgo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:visibility="gone" android:indeterminateTint="@color/yellow_primary" />
</RelativeLayout> </ScrollView>
